title: Mosquito Control in Kensington, Brooklyn | $125 - $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mosquito control services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Protect your yard and family from mosquitoes. Prices from $125 - $325. Same-day service available!
intro: Kensington residents deserve to enjoy their backyards and tree-lined streets without the constant annoyance of mosquitoes. Our professional mosquito control services target breeding sites and adult populations to create a comfortable outdoor environment for your family. With affordable pricing from $125 to $325, we provide effective mosquito treatments tailored to Kensington's mix of residential properties and green spaces.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Kensington's unique landscape, from the Victorian homes near Ocean Parkway to the garden apartments along Church Avenue. Our technicians understand local mosquito hotspots and use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets while delivering lasting results throughout the season.
localContext: Kensington's proximity to Prospect Park and its many tree-lined residential blocks create ideal conditions for mosquito breeding, especially during Brooklyn's humid summer months. The neighborhood's mix of private gardens, courtyards, and older apartment buildings with standing water sources requires targeted mosquito control strategies to keep outdoor spaces enjoyable.

faqs.question: How often do I need mosquito treatments in Kensington?
faqs.answer: We recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (May through September) for optimal protection. Kensington's proximity to green spaces and the humid Brooklyn climate means mosquitoes can reproduce quickly, making regular treatments essential for continuous outdoor comfort.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. Treatments dry within 30 minutes, after which your yard is safe to use. We take extra care in residential areas like Kensington where children and pets regularly use outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: What does the $125 - $325 price range include?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size and treatment frequency. A typical Kensington residential property (up to 5,000 sq ft) starts at $125 per treatment, while larger yards or seasonal packages range up to $325. We provide free inspections and customized quotes based on your specific needs.

faqs.question: Do you treat both yards and common areas in apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We service both private homes and multi-family buildings throughout Kensington. For apartment buildings, we can treat courtyards, garden areas, and other shared outdoor spaces. We work with building management to schedule treatments at convenient times for all residents.
